changes.summary: The AFL team The Show has fresh artwork — a new graffiti-style avatar now shows up wherever the team appears across the site (standings, rosters, and the GroupMe chat), replacing the old placeholder mark.

The League's homepage hero and What's New page no longer pick up AFL-only announcements — an untagged AFL feature (the franchise trophy room) had been headlining The League's homepage. League tagging is now mandatory and fails closed, so cross-league mix-ups can't happen again.
The 'Roger and Schefter Suit Up for AFL' announcement is visible again on the AFL What's New page — a mistyped league tag had been silently hiding it from every site since late June.
